subcodes.first_line: How can I remember Thee, O Lord of the exalted heavens, and open my lips with Thy praise amidst humanity, when trials have encompassed me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کیف اذکرک یا رب السموات العلی و افتح شفتی بذکرک بین الوری و قد احاطنی البلاء
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for martyrs, @prayer for protection, @martyrs and martyrdom
